blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,922 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
